name: niftiresampler

metadata.name: NiftiResampler
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU Affero General Public License v3
metadata.summary: Tools for reading dicom files, RT structures, and dose files, as well as tools for converting numpy prediction masks back to an RT structure

documentation:
# Resample_Class

For resampling nifti images (likely for medical purposes)

## Installation

```
    pip install NiftiResampler
```

### Usage

```python
from NiftiResampler.ResampleTools import ImageResampler, sitk

Resampler = ImageResampler()
base_image = sitk.ReadImage(image_path)
desired_dimensions = (0.975, 0.975, 5.0)
resampled = Resampler.resample_image(input_image_handle=base_image, ref_resampling_handle=None,
                                     output_spacing=(0.975, 0.975, 5), interpolator='Linear', empty_value=-1024)
```

methods.name: NiftiResampler.ResampleTools.ImageResampler.resample_image
documentation:
---
param empty_value: default value used to pad image by the resampler
param input_image_handle: SimpleITK image handle that will be resampled
param interpolator: '''Linear'' or ''Nearest'''
param output_spacing: a tuple of spacing that is desired for the input_image to be
  resampled to
param ref_resampling_handle: a reference SimpleITK image handle that has the desired
  dimensions
return: true
---
